title: Enhancing Cloud Engineering with GitHub Copilot
description: Practical session on weaving GitHub Copilot into a Cloud Engineer's daily workflow — real-world prompts for IaC, scripting and review, and how AI-assisted suggestions reduce errors and ship infrastructure changes faster.

title: Introduction to Cloud Computing
description: Azure Learning Series — a beginner-friendly walkthrough of cloud fundamentals: deployment models, service tiers (IaaS / PaaS / SaaS) and how Azure maps to them.

title: Get Started with Azure AI Services
description: A guided tour of the Azure AI Services portfolio — Vision, Language, Speech, Document Intelligence and OpenAI — with live demos of how to call them from a real app and pick the right service per use case.

title: AZ-104 Bootcamp — Day 1
description: Kick-off of the community AZ-104 bootcamp — exam blueprint, prep strategy and a foundational walk through Azure architecture, subscriptions and the portal/CLI/PowerShell tooling you'll use across the series.

title: AZ-104 Bootcamp — Day 2
description: Governance & identity deep dive: managing subscriptions and tags, Azure Policy, management groups, RBAC with built-in and custom roles, and Microsoft Entra ID basics for AZ-104.

title: AZ-104 Bootcamp — Day 3
description: Azure Storage end-to-end: storage accounts, Blob object replication and lifecycle management, Azure Files with File Sync, share snapshots, and securing storage with network access controls.

title: AZ-104 Bootcamp — Day 4
description: Networking on Azure: designing VNets and subnets, Azure DNS and service endpoints, plus traffic management with Azure Load Balancer and Application Gateway — including a CLI walkthrough.

title: AZ-104 Bootcamp — Day 5 — Azure VM
description: Hands-on with Azure Virtual Machines for the AZ-104 exam: provisioning and sizing VMs, availability sets and zones, scale sets, disks, and day-2 ops like start/stop, resize and backup.

title: AZ-104 Bootcamp — Day 6 — Azure Monitoring
description: Monitoring and observability for Azure administrators: Azure Monitor, metrics and Log Analytics with KQL, alert rules, action groups and the basics of Application Insights for app-level signals.

title: AZ-104 Bootcamp — Day 7 — Connectivity & Web App
description: Hybrid connectivity and PaaS hosting: VNet peering and VPN gateway concepts, plus deploying and scaling apps on Azure App Service with deployment slots and configuration.

title: AZ-104 Bootcamp — Day 8 — Wrap Up
description: Final session of the AZ-104 bootcamp — recap of every domain (identity, governance, storage, compute, networking, monitoring), an exam-day checklist and the most-asked Q&A from the series.

title: CI/CD Pipeline in Azure DevOps
description: Whizlabs Webinar — building a real CI/CD pipeline in Azure DevOps: connecting a repo, multi-stage YAML pipelines, environments and approvals, and deploying to Azure with service connections.
